category_sources: Official GitHub repository description identifies Tini as a tiny valid init for containers.
source_facts.description says it is a tiny but valid init for containers.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository is krallin/tini and uses the Tini project name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the main documentation surface for usage and container integration.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provided; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists docker-init, tini, and tini-static.
